message:
fix(search): eliminate race condition in TwoTierBridge initialization

Replace two-step "check then init" pattern with atomic OnceLock::get_or_init:
- get_or_init_semantic_bridge(): now atomic
- get_or_init_two_tier_bridge(): new atomic getter
- try_two_tier_search(): uses atomic getter
- init_two_tier_bridge(): deprecated

Add thread-safety test verifying Arc pointer equality across 10 threads.

Fixes br-2tnl.5.10.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
